steps.detail: Spawned backend agent (sonnet/max) for tasks: af84998a6d2f

task_snapshots.title: 334b-04: Cost history & alert thresholds
task_snapshots.description:
[subtask of eb03f5696c69]

## Task
Implement cost history persistence and alert logic in src/bernstein/core/store.py

## Requirements
- Persist daily cost snapshots to .sdd/metrics/cost_history.jsonl
- Track 6-month trailing cost history
- Implement alert trigger at 80% budget attainment
- Expose GET /costs/alerts endpoint
- Include trend calculation (30d, 90d comparisons)

## Completion
✓ Cost history persisted daily
✓ 6-month history available via API
✓ Alerts trigger correctly at 80%
✓ Trend data calculated and exposed
